headline: Semiconductor Chip Stocks Slump As Middle East War Hits Day 28: Trump Sets New Deadline
summary: Tech stocks and semiconductors (NVDA, AMD, ARM) slide as the U.S.–Israel–Iran conflict enters its 28th day. Discover how a global helium shortage is threatening AI chip production.
